name: DEDACT
description: DEDACT (Document Extraction, De-Redaction, and Analysis Capability Tool) is a forensic PDF analysis tool for investigative research. Feeds the Fine Print / National Razor Dashboard.
purpose: Extract, analyze, and de-redact documents for investigative journalism and crisis capitalism research.
success_criteria: Integrated into Fine Print Dashboard pipeline
tagline: Forensic PDF analysis for investigative research.
author: dk-001
